note: Ownership map as structured data. concept -> owner doc (+ allowed referencers). Holds NO code anchors (those live in the docs themselves). Owner/reference paths are relative to docs/. The prose rule ('edit the owner; link, don't redefine') is generic and lives in the global authoring-rules.

concepts.summary: procedural cortical surface (icosphere subdivision, gyrification noise, neuron placement), region assignment (input/assoc/output, uniform over volume), per-neuron morphology geometry generation
SoA GPU buffer layout (pos_x/y/z, v, I, last_spike), packed last_spike word (HAS_SPIKED bit + 7-bit type + 24-bit tick), shared mask/tick_diff helpers, fixed-point i32 current accumulator (S=4096)

procedural/implicit connectivity (no edge list), target/weight pure functions, integer spatial grid, per-tier K, anterior feed-forward bias, the heavy-tailed long-range reach tail (ReachParams: long_range_frac/max_reach, default-off bit-identical), the 32-bit hash primitive + golden-vector gate

LIF dynamics (integrate/threshold/refractory/scatter), E/I balance, ambient I_ext drive, excitability/SOC, per-neuron heterogeneity, weight normalization, input modes, cursor stimulation; the SimBackend/SimConfig/TickStats/VisualSettings boundary contract

GpuBackend per-tick compute frame graph + render-pass ordering, GpuResources/GpuPipelines lifecycle (persistent buffers, bind_groups_dirty, resize guards), GPU-driven indirect scatter dispatch, async Idle/Pending staging readback

render LOD scheme (far additive glow billboards, live per-neuron morphology pass, retired near-sphere/cylinder behind DRAW_LEGACY_*), the depth-tested alpha active-opacity layer (active=firing tubes/somas occlude the additive resting layer; active_opacity/inactive_opacity_floor knobs), frustum-cull→indirect-draw, manifold surface render, HDR/bloom, visual mode enums (color_by/neuron_visibility/signal_source/surface)
the retired active-edge ribbon subsystem (EdgeEvent emit-on-spike, ring buffer + budget, GPU-side Bezier ribbon geometry); kept but guarded off by DRAW_LEGACY_RIBBONS — morphology superseded it
the retired CPU/WebGL2 backend boundary: no live CPU runtime code, stale CPU app configs normalize to GPU, git history is the archive

the TS app shell: main.ts orchestrator + rAF loop + wasm call boundary, camera (orbit/zoom MVP), controls (brain-state presets, speed, stimulation), renderer.ts (device/canvas/render target), types.ts (AppConfig/DEFAULT_CONFIG), public HUD shell, natural silent-start

the wasm_bindgen entry surface (lib.rs): WasmGpuBackend.create lifecycle, the JS-facing tick/render/settings API, the rAF &mut reentrancy discipline, what crosses wasm↔JS (bridge mechanics, not the data-layout contracts)

the hidden dev panel (open triggers, tabs, impact-dot system from SETTING_IMPACT), settings persistence contract (versioned bv2_settings_v1 localStorage, public/dev split, merge-over-defaults, no preset manager), the VisualSettings Float32Array index contract

perf instrumentation: profiler.rs ring + per-second JSON, web/profiler.ts + corner HUD, the GPU metrics.wgsl reduction pass + non-blocking Idle/Pending readback, parseMetrics layout, CPU-side branching ratio; headline = synaptic events/sec
fixed-N scaling, dormant scaler proposal, difficulty tiers, gpu_limits.rs adapter-limit→caps, and the 20k product cap
build pipeline (wasm-pack→tsc→vite), COOP/COEP (coi-serviceworker shim), the examples as offline verification surface, the test gates, llvmpipe offline validation
from-scratch point-LIF, no graphics engine, SNN engine choice, beauty-first ~10k scale
GPU-only runtime backend, deleted CPU/WebGL2 code, stale CPU app-config normalization
packed last_spike word, fixed-point scale S=2^12 + overflow policy, GPU scatter accumulation layout
procedural no-edge-list, per-tier K, 32-bit hash with golden vectors
SOC/avalanche target, region topology + ambient drive, heterogeneity determinism, weight norm default sqrt_k, input modes
procedurally folded brain surface, region assignment approach, per-neuron morphology geometry

LOD glow→bodies, active-connections-only-by-default, morphology supersedes ribbons/cylinders, true-opacity (depth+alpha) for active geometry over faked-additive-brightness, active=firing not click-selection
three tiers, K as a per-tier scaler axis, and the 20k product cap separate from GPU hardware capacity
pretty-toy interaction model, natural start (no scripted intro), speed presets, brain-state presets
first-class profiling + corner HUD, periodic GPU reduction + async readback, cheap hot-loop counters
hidden dev panel + impact-dot metadata, versioned localStorage, no preset manager
